notes: EN8.4 Part B: BEIR benchmark evaluation of quantized vector retrieval. Pre-registered prediction for RQ-B3: SL mixed-precision improvement likely null or marginal (consistent with Part A RQ5 = -0.018). All metrics include bootstrap 95% CIs (n=1000).
